    <item>
        <guid>nba528793</guid>
        <title>Stephen Curry: Tweaks ankle, likely to play Sunday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephen-curry-3014</link>
        <description>Head coach Steve Kerr said Curry tweaked his right ankle in Friday's 124-118 loss to the Kings, though he's expected to play in Sunday's game against the Clippers, Sam Gordon of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 10:21:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528790</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Fills stat sheet vs. Charlotte</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham posted 14 points (7-13 FG, 0-3 3Pt, 0-1 FT), two rebounds, seven assists, one block and one steal over 28 minutes during Friday's 118-100 win over the Hornets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 10:13:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528789</guid>
        <title>Jalen Duren: Nears double-double Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-duren-5703</link>
        <description>Duren had 20 points (8-11 FG, 4-4 FT), nine rebounds and four assists over 22 minutes during Friday's 118-100 victory over the Hornets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 10:11:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528767</guid>
        <title>Grayson Allen: Won't return Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/grayson-allen-4454</link>
        <description>Allen (hamstring) won't return to Friday's game against the Lakers. He'll finish with eight points (2-7 FG, 1-5 3Pt, 3-3 FT), four rebounds, one assist and one steal across 13 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 8:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528751</guid>
        <title>Grayson Allen: Exits to locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/grayson-allen-4454</link>
        <description>Allen exited to the locker room in the second quarter of Friday's game against the Lakers due to an apparent left hamstring injury, Amanda Pflugrad of 3TV Phoenix reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 8:26:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
